mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", applicant.name AS "applicantName", creator.name AS "createdByName" FROM payment_request a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account applicant ON applicant.id = a.applicant_id LEFT JOIN sys_account creator ON creator.id = a.created_by
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.projectName}, '%') AND p.name LIKE '%' || #{params.projectName} || '%'
AND applicant.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{params.applicantName}, '%') AND applicant.name LIKE '%' || #{params.applicantName} || '%'
AND a.status = #{params.status}
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC, a.id DESC

SELECT a.*, p.code AS "projectCode", p.name AS "projectName", applicant.name AS "applicantName", creator.name AS "createdByName" FROM payment_request a LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = a.project_id LEFT JOIN sys_account applicant ON applicant.id = a.applicant_id LEFT JOIN sys_account creator ON creator.id = a.created_by WHERE a.id = #{id}
